dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 11, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**Guardians Crush Angels in Dominant 7-2 Victory**

The Cleveland Guardians flexed their muscles, handing the Los Angeles Angels a 7-2 defeat behind a strong team effort. Joey Cantillo led the charge, tossing 6 shutout innings with 4 strikeouts, earning the win. In a supporting role, Travis Bazzana collected 2 RBIs on a single, while Vaughn Grissom's sharp line drive single scored the decisive run.

**Orioles Edge Yankees in Thrilling 3-2 Affair**

The Baltimore Orioles outlasted the New York Yankees, securing a 3-2 victory. Coby Mayo's 1-run homer (4) propelled the Orioles, while Ryan Weathers delivered 9 strikeouts over 6.1 innings, limiting the Yankees to just one run. Anthony Nunez earned the save, securing the win for Baltimore.

**Rays Outlast Blue Jays in High-Scoring 8-5 Showdown**

The Tampa Bay Rays overcame the Toronto Blue Jays, winning 8-5 behind Drew Rasmussen's strong outing. Rasmussen earned the win, while Andrés Giménez went deep twice, driving in 5 runs. Bryan Baker closed out the game with 2 strikeouts in the 9th, securing the save.

**Diamondbacks Shut Down Rangers in 1-0 Thriller**

The Arizona Diamondbacks edged the Texas Rangers 1-0, thanks to Michael Soroka's 6.1 shutout innings, featuring 5 strikeouts. Geraldo Perdomo's double drove in the game's only run, securing the win for Arizona.

**Mariners Top Astros in Low-Scoring 3-1 Affair**

The Seattle Mariners outlasted the Houston Astros 3-1, behind George Kirby's 5-strikeout outing. Julio Rodríguez went deep, driving in a run, while Kirby earned the win, securing the Mariners' narrow victory.

**Giants Rout Dodgers in 9-3 Blowout**

The San Francisco Giants dominated the Los Angeles Dodgers, winning 9-3. Rafael Devers homered, driving in 2 runs, while Matt Gage earned the win, pitching 1 scoreless inning. The Giants' strong team effort led to their decisive victory.
